p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 pass-to-pass tests based on discovered CI commands. Docker build failed due to openjdk-17-jdk not available in python:3.12-slim (Debian trixie) - validate agent will need to fix Dockerfile. CI commands discovered from repo analysis: (1) ./gradlew :compiler:fir:checkers:compileKotlin - core FIR checkers compilation (2) ./gradlew :compiler:fir:analysis-tests:compileTestFixturesKotlin - test infrastructure compilation (3) ./gradlew :compiler:fir:analysis-tests:test --tests *Annotation* - annotation-related FIR tests (4) ./gradlew :compiler:fir:tree:tree-generator:compileKotlin - FIR tree generator compilation (5) ./gradlew projects - basic Gradle sanity. These commands target the modified modules (FirAnnotationHelpers.kt, FirOptInMarkedDeclarationChecker.kt, FirAnnotationChecker.kt, FirSupertypesChecker.kt, FirTree.kt) and should pass on both base commit and after fix.
